A

addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Registers a servlet for the given HTTP method and URI prefix.
addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
 

C

close() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Stops accepting new clients, closes the server socket, shuts down worker threads, and closes registered servlets.
close() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
 
close() - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
Releases resources owned by this servlet.
content - Variable in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Raw request body bytes.

G

getContent() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Gets the raw request body.
getHttpCommand() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Gets the normalized HTTP method.
getParameters() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Gets the decoded query parameters.
getUri() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Gets the original request URI.
getUriParts() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Gets the URI path segments.

H

handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
Handles one HTTP request.
httpCommand - Variable in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Normalized HTTP method such as GET or POST.
HTTPServer - Interface in server
Minimal HTTP server contract used by the project.

M

MyHTTPServer - Class in server
Socket-based implementation of HTTPServer.
MyHTTPServer(int, int) - Constructor for class server.MyHTTPServer
Creates a server bound to the given port.

P

parameters - Variable in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Decoded query parameters keyed by parameter name.
parseRequest(BufferedReader) - Static method in class server.RequestParser
Parses one HTTP request from a buffered character stream.

R

removeServlet(String, String) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Removes a servlet registration.
removeServlet(String, String) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
 
RequestInfo(String, String, String[], Map<String, String>, byte[]) - Constructor for class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Creates a parsed request value.
RequestParser - Class in server
Parses the small HTTP request subset used by MyHTTPServer.
RequestParser.RequestInfo - Class in server
Parsed request data passed from the HTTP server to servlets.
run() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
 

S

server - package server
 
Servlet - Interface in servlets
Request handler used by MyHTTPServer.
servlets - package servlets
 
start() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Starts the server accept loop on its background thread.
start() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
 

U

uri - Variable in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Original request URI, including query string when present.
uriParts - Variable in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
URI path segments without leading slash or query string.
